services.notes: Public hospital with emergency department (pronto soccorso), some English-speaking staff

services.notes: Well-stocked pharmacy, prescription medications, some English spoken

services.notes: Largest Italian bank, ATMs, some English-speaking staff

services.notes: General practice (medico di base), registration with ASL required

services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, some English-speaking dentists, modern equipment

services.notes: Full veterinary services, vaccinations, surgery, some English spoken

services.notes: Off-leash area, green space popular with dog owners, water available

services.notes: Modern gym with cardio and weight equipment, group classes, monthly memberships

services.notes: English-language services, expat community gathering point, social events

services.name: Milan Malpensa Airport (MXP)
services.notes: International airport with domestic and international flights

services.name: Talent Garden Stresa

services.name: Pet Grooming Stresa
